Interface IAGSServerConnection

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GISClient
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GISClient.dll

Provides access to members that have information about the GIS server connection..

[Guid("657F65FD-9795-40B4-B1CE-E235EF08614C")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IAGSServerConnection

Properties

FullName

The AGSServerConnectionName object assiated with the GIS server connection.

IName FullName { get; set; }

Property Value

IName

Examples

Sample Snippet

Name

The name of the connection.

string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ServerObjectNames

The ServerObjectNames in the GIS server.

IAGSEnumServerObjectName ServerObjectNames { get; }

Property Value

IAGSEnumServerObjectName
